results.name: omni-index dedups re-opens by addr + bumps frequency
omni-index discovers by attribute (title, not address)
omni-index applies holo-rank authority (ranked κ scores higher)
Q.recall finds a private object by its BODY content (not its title)
Q.recall is model-free + sealed (carries a receipt, zero network)
composePersonalScene returns a private, SCENE-shaped feed (hero/thumbs/stories)
the feed spans multiple media types (video + audio play in place)
every leaf carries a 'why' provenance line
holo-rank lifts the authoritative κ to the hero (equal recency)
intent steers the feed (a body/title match leads on intent)
diversity spreads origins into the hero (not one-source clustering)
rotate cycles the mid-tier (idle exploration) with the top-2 anchors stable
thin history → HONEST demo fallback (never invents a personal feed)
classifyMedia: direct media URL → file · platform host → platform · bare name → none
resolveMediaSource: a κ-route media file is playable + verified (Range/206 seekable)
yt-dlp seam default-OFF → honest browser fallback (sovereign, no baked gatekeeper)
seam-ON → SAME κ-player lights up, sealed hosc:Egress receipt (directExtract:false)
governance veto → honest null → browser fallback (never fabricates a stream)
extractor failure → honest null → browser fallback (Law L5: no fake green)

spec: The omnisearch→live-feed fusion: the omnibar conducts a private-context-first, holo-rank-ordered, origin-diversified feed of self-verifying κ-objects spanning every media type; Q.recall retrieves by content model-free; the yt-dlp seam is a governed, opt-in, receipt-sealed egress tier that never fabricates a stream
